overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval fantasy village at dusk. The character passes a dog and walks through a stone gatehouse into an open field beyond the village walls, transitioning from torch-lit village to open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village path approaching fortified stone gatehouse

events.description: dog stands up and crosses the path from right to left in front of Geralt
approaching the stone archway entrance of the gatehouse

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the village path toward the stone gate, swords visible on his back

notable_agents.action: dog stands up from lying position and crosses the path from right to left

entered.detail: large fortified stone gatehouse with wooden scaffolding and arched entranceway
traditional wooden house with steep straw thatched roof
wooden building with warm orange campfire light glowing outside
flickering fire illuminating the right side of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval village at dusk toward a large stone gatehouse. A dog crosses the path in front of him around the 3-second mark. The scene features traditional wooden houses with thatched roofs, a campfire burning on the right, and the imposing stone gate ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway tunnel through the village fortification wall

events.description: entering the dark stone tunnel, ambient light drops significantly
natural dusk light becomes visible at the tunnel exit ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the dark stone corridor toward the distant exit light

entered.detail: enclosed stone corridor with rough brick walls and arched ceiling forming the gate passage
warm orange torch light mounted on the left tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed stone tunnel as Geralt passes through the gatehouse. Torchlight flickers on the left wall while the tunnel stretches ahead toward a distant patch of natural light. The village structures are now behind as the character moves through the fortification.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field beyond village walls with defensive wooden palisades

events.description: exiting the stone tunnel into the open countryside beyond the village walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerging from the gate into the open field, continuing along the dirt path

entered.detail: tall wooden stake fence lining the left side of the path
tall wooden stake fence lining the right side of the path
stone ruins and rubble visible in the distance under the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the tunnel into an open field flanked by tall wooden palisade fences on both sides. The sky is fully visible again with dark overcast clouds. Stone ruins are visible in the distance ahead as the path continues into the wilderness beyond the village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a torch-lit medieval village through a fortified gatehouse and out into a desolate open field. It begins with Geralt walking past thatched-roof houses and a burning campfire, as a dog crosses his path while he approaches a large stone gate. As he enters the gatehouse, the environment shifts abruptly into a dark, enclosed stone tunnel where flickering torchlight on the walls guides the way toward a distant patch of natural light. The scene then opens up as he exits the tunnel, transitioning from the confinement of the fortification to an open path flanked by tall wooden palisade fences. Finally, the view expands under a dark, overcast sky, revealing stone ruins in the distance as the character moves into the wilderness.
